title: Model council runner smoke task
question: When should a model-council skill use local CLIs versus a hosted AI gateway?
context: The workflow should support OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and xAI model routes.
The runner should keep model routes explicit and configurable.
The runner should be deterministic enough to dry-run without spending model tokens.
success_criteria: Identify deterministic controls required for repeatability.
Preserve material disagreement in the synthesis.
Recommend a safe base benchmark setup.
